tasks.title: Add Contract Company column to commitments list table
tasks.description: Add a 'contract_company' column entry to commitmentColumns array and buildCommitmentTableColumns function. Data is already fetched (item.contract_company?.name used in card view). Insert after 'number' column.

tasks.title: Wire AttachmentsTab into commitment detail page
tasks.description: Import AttachmentsTab from '@/components/commitments/tabs/AttachmentsTab' and add it to the detail page render logic. Add 'Attachments' tab entry to PageTabs array. The API route already exists at /api/commitments/[id]/attachments.

tasks.title: Fix 3 column label strings to match Procore
tasks.description: Update labels: 'Original Amount' → 'Original Contract Amount', 'Revised Amount' → 'Revised Contract Amount', 'Remaining Balance' → 'Remaining Balance Outstanding'

tasks.title: Migrate commitment APIs to project-scoped routes (optional)
tasks.description: Move /api/commitments/* to /api/projects/[projectId]/commitments/* for consistency with other financial tools. Low urgency — functional as-is.
